nasb.text: Or do you not know that the one who joins himself to a prostitute is one body with her? For He says, “The two shall become one flesh.”

esv.text: Or do you not know that he who is joined to a prostitute becomes one body with her? For, as it is written, “The two will become one flesh.”

cnv.text: 你們不知道那跟娼妓苟合的，就是與她成為一體了嗎？因為經上說：“二人要成為一體。”

ccb.text: 你们不知道与妓女苟合，就是和她成为一体吗？因为主说：“二人要成为一体”。

csbs.text: 难道你们不知道，那与妓女结合的，就是与她成为一体了吗？因为经上说：“两个人就成为一体。”
